description: CBPR+: UETR is mandatory in pacs.008 even though the XSD declares it optional.
errorMessage: UETR (Unique End-to-End Transaction Reference) is mandatory in pacs.008 under CBPR+.
fix: Add a valid UUID v4 to <PmtId><UETR> (e.g., 4a1a0945-5772-409a-83ba-240e666e0267).

description: CBPR+: Debtor is mandatory in pacs.008.
CBPR+: Creditor is mandatory in pacs.008.
CBPR+: Debtor Name is mandatory in pacs.008.
CBPR+: Creditor Name is mandatory in pacs.008.
CBPR+: Debtor Account is mandatory in customer credit transfers (pacs.008).
errorMessage: DbtrAcct is mandatory in pacs.008 — every customer payment must reference a debtor account.
fix: Add <DbtrAcct><Id><IBAN>...</IBAN></Id></DbtrAcct> (or <Othr><Id>...</Id></Othr> for non-IBAN accounts).

description: CBPR+: Creditor Account is mandatory in customer credit transfers (pacs.008).
errorMessage: CdtrAcct is mandatory in pacs.008 — every customer payment must reference a creditor account.
fix: Add <CdtrAcct><Id><IBAN>...</IBAN></Id></CdtrAcct> (or <Othr><Id>...</Id></Othr> for non-IBAN accounts).

description: CBPR+: ChrgBr (Charge Bearer) is mandatory in pacs.008.
CBPR+: Interbank Settlement Date is mandatory.
Instruction Priority (InstrPrty) must be HIGH or NORM.
Debtor Agent BIC and Creditor Agent BIC must not be identical in pacs.008 (loopback).
errorMessage: Debtor Agent BIC equals Creditor Agent BIC — verify this is not a loopback payment.
fix: If you intend a same-bank transfer, this is acceptable; otherwise correct one of the agents.

description: If InstdAmt currency differs from IntrBkSttlmAmt currency, XchgRate must be present (FX transfer).
errorMessage: InstdAmt currency differs from IntrBkSttlmAmt currency but no XchgRate provided.
fix: Add <XchgRate> with the FX rate used to derive IntrBkSttlmAmt from InstdAmt.

description: If InstdAmt currency equals IntrBkSttlmAmt currency, XchgRate must NOT be present (no FX).
errorMessage: XchgRate provided but InstdAmt and IntrBkSttlmAmt share the same currency — exchange rate not applicable.
fix: Remove <XchgRate> when the instructed and settlement amounts are in the same currency.

description: When ChrgBr=CRED, at least one ChrgsInformation must be present (use Amt=0.00 if no charges taken).
errorMessage: ChrgBr=CRED requires at least one <ChrgsInf> block. If no charges are deducted, use <Amt Ccy="...">0.00</Amt>.
fix: Add <ChrgsInf><Amt Ccy="USD">0.00</Amt><Agt><FinInstnId><BICFI>BANKUS33XXX</BICFI></FinInstnId></Agt></ChrgsInf> inside <CdtTrfTxInf>.

description: If ChrgsInf is present, an Agt (charge-bearing agent) must be inside it.
errorMessage: Charges Information block present without <Agt> (the charge-bearing agent).
fix: Add <Agt><FinInstnId><BICFI>...</BICFI></FinInstnId></Agt> inside <ChrgsInf>.

description: NbOfTxs must equal the actual number of <CdtTrfTxInf> elements.
expression: int(Document.FIToFICstmrCdtTrf.GrpHdr.NbOfTxs) == sum(1 for k in DATA.keys() if k.startswith('Document.FIToFICstmrCdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf') and k.endswith('.PmtId.EndToEndId'))
errorMessage: Group Header NbOfTxs does not match the actual number of CdtTrfTxInf blocks.
fix: Update <NbOfTxs> to equal the count of <CdtTrfTxInf> transaction blocks present.

description: DbtrAgtAcct may only be present if DbtrAgt is also present.
CdtrAgtAcct may only be present if CdtrAgt is also present.

name: CBPR_Priority_Instruction_Priority_FormalRule
description: If AppHdr/Prty is present, its value must match CdtTrfTxInf/PmtTpInf/InstrPrty where present.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Prty> must match CdtTrfTxInf <InstrPrty> when both are present.
fix: Align <Prty> in AppHdr with <InstrPrty> in <PmtTpInf>.

name: CBPR_From_To_Instructing_Instructed_Agent_BIC_1_FormalRule
description: When AppHdr/CpyDplct is not COPY or CODU: AppHdr/Fr BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstgAgt BICFI, and AppHdr/To BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstdAgt BICFI.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Fr> BICFI must match <InstgAgt> BICFI and <To> BICFI must match <InstdAgt> BICFI (when CpyDplct is not COPY/CODU).
fix: Align AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs with CdtTrfTxInf <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs.

name: CBPR_From_To_Instructing_Instructed_Agent_BIC_2_FormalRule
description: When AppHdr/CpyDplct is absent: AppHdr/Fr BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstgAgt BICFI, and AppHdr/To BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstdAgt BICFI.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs must match <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs (when CpyDplct is absent).
fix: Align AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs with CdtTrfTxInf <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs.

name: CBPR_Character_Set_Usage
description: Character set usage must comply with CBPR Plus UHB specifications (enforced by CBPR_COM_R1 in cbpr_common.json).
errorMessage: Character set check is enforced globally by CBPR_COM_R1.

name: CBPR_Business_Message_Identifier
description: BizMsgIdr must contain the MsgId from the GroupHeader of the underlying message.
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizMsgIdr> must match <GrpHdr><MsgId> in the underlying pacs.008 message.
fix: Set <BizMsgIdr> equal to <GrpHdr><MsgId>.

name: CBPR_Message_Definition_Identifier
description: MsgDefIdr must be formatted exactly as it appears in the namespace (pacs.008.001.08).
errorMessage: AppHdr <MsgDefIdr> must be 'pacs.008.001.08' for pacs.008 messages.
fix: Set <MsgDefIdr>pacs.008.001.08</MsgDefIdr> in AppHdr.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_TextualRule
description: BizSvc may be used by SWIFT for differentiated processing. User-specific values require Service Administrator alignment.
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizSvc> value must be aligned with Service Administrator if using a user-specific value.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_Usage_TextualRule
description: BizSvc must have the value 'swift.cbprplus.02' for pacs.008.
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizSvc> must be 'swift.cbprplus.02' for pacs.008.
fix: Set <BizSvc>swift.cbprplus.02</BizSvc> in AppHdr.

name: CBPR_Market_Practice_TextualRule
description: MktPrctc may be used by SWIFT. User-specific values require Service Administrator alignment.
errorMessage: AppHdr <MktPrctc> value must be aligned with Service Administrator if user-specific.

name: CBPR_Related_Business_Application_Header
description: If RltdBizMsg is present, it must contain Fr, To, BizMsgIdr, MsgDefIdr, and CreDtTm.
expression: exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.Fr) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.To) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.BizMsgIdr) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.MsgDefIdr) and exists(AppHdr.RltdBizMsg.CreDtTm)
errorMessage: AppHdr <RltdBizMsg> must contain <Fr>, <To>, <BizMsgIdr>, <MsgDefIdr>, and <CreDtTm> from the referenced BAH.
fix: Populate all mandatory BAH fields inside <RltdBizMsg>: Fr, To, BizMsgIdr, MsgDefIdr, CreDtTm.

name: CBPR_Related_BAH_Business_Service_TextualRule
description: If RltdBizMsg is present, it should carry the BizSvc element.
errorMessage: AppHdr <RltdBizMsg> should include <BizSvc> when present.
fix: Add <BizSvc> inside <RltdBizMsg>.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_ChrgsInf_FormalRule
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgsInf/Agt/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgsInf/Agt/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_Instruction_for_Creditor_Agent1_FormalRule
description: InstrForCdtrAgt code HOLD is not allowed when CHQB is present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt: code HOLD must not be present when CHQB is present.
fix: Remove HOLD from <InstrForCdtrAgt> when CHQB is used.

name: CBPR_Instruction_for_Creditor_Agent2_FormalRule
description: InstrForCdtrAgt code TELB is not allowed when PHOB is present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt: code TELB must not be present when PHOB is present.
fix: Remove TELB from <InstrForCdtrAgt> when PHOB is used.

name: CBPR_Agent_National_only_TextualRule
description: When DbtrAgt, CdtrAgt and all agents in between are in the same country, the clearing code alone may be used.
errorMessage: Agent (national): ClrSysMmbId alone is permitted when all agents are in the same country.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_1_TextualRule
description: Agent identification option 1 (preferred): BICFI, optionally complemented with LEI.
errorMessage: Agent Option 1 (preferred): use <BICFI>, optionally with <LEI>.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_2
description: Agent option 2: if ClrSysMmbId OR LEI is present (without BICFI), then both Nm AND PstlAdr must also be present.
expression: all((not (robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') or robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) and robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 2: when ClrSysMmbId or LEI is used (without BICFI), <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present.
fix: Add <Nm> and <PstlAdr> inside <FinInstnId> when using ClrSysMmbId or LEI without BICFI.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_3
description: Agent option 3: if Nm is present (without BICFI, ClrSysMmbId, or LEI), PstlAdr with at minimum TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
expression: all(not robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI') and not robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') and not robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 3: when Nm is present without BICFI/ClrSysMmbId/LEI, a <PstlAdr> with at least <TwnNm> and <Ctry> must be present.
fix: Add <PstlAdr> with <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <FinInstnId> when using Name-only identification.

name: CBPR_Agent_Point_To_Point_On_SWIFT
description: BICFI is mandatory for DbtrAgt and CdtrAgt identification in pacs.008 (both on SWIFT network).
errorMessage: Agent: <BICFI> is mandatory for both DbtrAgt and CdtrAgt in pacs.008 (SWIFT point-to-point).
fix: Provide <BICFI> inside <FinInstnId> for both <DbtrAgt> and <CdtrAgt>.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_InstgRmbrsmntAgt_FormalRule
description: In GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_InstgRmbrsmntAgt
description: In GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <PstlAdr>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_InstgRmbrsmntAgt
description: In GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine and other element present, TwnNm and Ctry mandatory; max 2 AdrLine.
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_Hybrid_Postal_Address
description: Hybrid address mode: when AdrLine is present, TwnNm and Ctry are mandatory and at least one AdrLine must be present. Detail structural fields (StrtNm, BldgNb, BldgNm, Flr, PstBx, Room, PstCd, Dept, SubDept, TwnLctnNm, DstrctNm, CtrySubDvsn) must NOT coexist with AdrLine.
expression: all(not (any(k2.startswith(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.') and not k2.startswith(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.AdrLine') and k2.split('.')[-1] in ('StrtNm','BldgNb','BldgNm','Flr','PstBx','Room','PstCd','Dept','SubDept','TwnLctnNm','DstrctNm','CtrySubDvsn') for k2 in DATA.keys())) for k in DATA.keys() if '.PstlAdr.AdrLine' in k)
errorMessage: PstlAdr hybrid mode: detail structured fields (StrtNm, BldgNb, PstCd etc.) must not coexist with <AdrLine>. Use hybrid (TwnNm + Ctry + AdrLine) or pure structured (no AdrLine).
fix: Remove StrtNm/BldgNb/PstCd/etc. and keep only TwnNm + Ctry alongside AdrLine, or remove AdrLine and use fully structured fields.

name: CBPR_Hybrid_TwnNm_Ctry_Mandatory
description: Hybrid address mode: when AdrLine is present, TwnNm and Ctry are both mandatory.
expression: all(exists(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.TwnNm') and exists(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.Ctry') for k in DATA.keys() if '.PstlAdr.AdrLine' in k)
errorMessage: PstlAdr hybrid mode: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> are mandatory when <AdrLine> is present.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> to the PstlAdr block that contains <AdrLine>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_InstgRmbrsmntAgt
description: In GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if only AdrLine present, each must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstgRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_InstdRmbrsmntAgt_FormalRule
description: In GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_InstdRmbrsmntAgt
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_InstdRmbrsmntAgt
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_InstdRmbrsmntAgt
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/InstdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_ThrdRmbrsmntAgt_FormalRule
description: In GrpHdr/SttlmInf/ThrdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/ThrdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_ThrdRmbrsmntAgt
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/ThrdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_ThrdRmbrsmntAgt
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/ThrdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_ThrdRmbrsmntAgt
errorMessage: GrpHdr/SttlmInf/ThrdRmbrsmntAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Related_Remit_Info_Remit_Info_Mutually_Exclusive_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/RltdRmtInf and CdtTrfTxInf/RmtInf are mutually exclusive.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf: <RltdRmtInf> and <RmtInf> are mutually exclusive.
fix: Use either <RltdRmtInf> or <RmtInf>, not both.

name: CBPR_Remittance_Mutually_Exclusive_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/RmtInf/Ustrd and CdtTrfTxInf/RmtInf/Strd are mutually exclusive.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/RmtInf: <Ustrd> and <Strd> are mutually exclusive.
fix: Use either <Ustrd> or <Strd> remittance, not both.

name: CBPR_CRED_FormalRule
description: If CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgBr is CRED, at least one ChrgsInf must be present (use zero amount if no charges taken).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf: <ChrgsInf> is mandatory when <ChrgBr> is CRED.
fix: Add <ChrgsInf> with zero <Amt> if no charges are taken.

name: CBPR_Instruction_For_Creditor_Presence_Code_FormalRule
description: Each code value in InstrForCdtrAgt/Cd can only be used once.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt: each <Cd> value must appear at most once.
fix: Remove duplicate code values from <InstrForCdtrAgt>.

name: CBPR_DEBT_FormalRule
description: If CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgBr is DEBT, a maximum of one ChrgsInf occurrence is allowed.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf: maximum 1 occurrence of <ChrgsInf> allowed when <ChrgBr> is DEBT.
fix: Reduce <ChrgsInf> to at most one occurrence when <ChrgBr> is DEBT.

name: CBPR_Instruction_Identification_FormalRule
description: PmtId/InstrId must not start or end with '/' and must not contain '//'
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/InstrId must not start/end with '/' or contain '//'.
fix: Remove leading/trailing slashes and double slashes from <InstrId>.

name: CBPR_Local_Instrument_Guideline
description: LclInstrm: the preferred option is coded information (Cd over Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/LclInstrm: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).

name: CBPR_Category_Purpose_Guideline
description: CtgyPurp: the preferred option is coded information (Cd over Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/CtgyPurp: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).

name: CBPR_Interbank_Settlement_Currency_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrBkSttlmAmt/Ccy must not be XAU, XAG, XPD, or XPT.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrBkSttlmAmt: <Ccy> must not be a commodity code (XAU/XAG/XPD/XPT).
fix: Use a valid ISO 4217 currency code.

name: CBPR_DEBT_Rule_1_TextualRule
description: DEBT same-currency: ChrgsInf mandatory only for prepaid charges; zero amount not allowed for prepaid.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf (DEBT, same currency): ChrgsInf mandatory only for prepaid charges; zero amount not allowed for prepaid.

name: CBPR_DEBT_Rule_2_TextualRule
description: DEBT cross-currency: ChrgsInf mandatory only for prepaid charges; zero amount not allowed.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf (DEBT, cross currency): ChrgsInf mandatory only for prepaid charges; zero amount not allowed for prepaid.

name: CBPR_SHAR_TextualRule
description: SHAR: ChrgsInf mandatory if a deduct is taken by the agent.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf (SHAR): <ChrgsInf> is mandatory when a deduct is taken.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_ChrgsInf
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgsInf/Agt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgsInf/Agt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_ChrgsInf
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgsInf/Agt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_ChrgsInf
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/ChrgsInf/Agt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_PrvsInstgAgt1_FormalRule
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_PrvsInstgAgt1
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_PrvsInstgAgt1
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_PrvsInstgAgt1
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_PrvsInstgAgt2_FormalRule
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_PrvsInstgAgt2
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_PrvsInstgAgt2
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_PrvsInstgAgt2
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_PrvsInstgAgt3_FormalRule
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_PrvsInstgAgt3
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_PrvsInstgAgt3
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_PrvsInstgAgt3
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_IntrmyAgt1_FormalRule
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_IntrmyAgt1
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_IntrmyAgt1
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_IntrmyAgt1
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_IntrmyAgt2_FormalRule
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt2/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_IntrmyAgt2
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt2/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_IntrmyAgt2
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt2/PstlAdr: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_IntrmyAgt2
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt2/PstlAdr: each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.
